top_signals.title: Average IBIT investor now down about 40% as spot bitcoin ETFs cap second-worst week on record
top_signals.summary: Friday's $444.51 million net outflow capped a seventh straight negative week, the longest weekly run on record for the category.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Magnitude 6.1 earthquake strikes off coast of Iwate
top_signals.summary: The quake registered a lower 6 on the Japanese seismic intensity scale of 7 in Hachinohe, Aomori Prefecture. No tsunami warning was issued.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
